content.text:
[Sun 2026-04-19 04:01 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: You are shadcn-expert. Set up shadcn/ui for the maiy-tech-hub Next.js project.

WORKSPACE: /root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub/

TASK: Initialize shadcn/ui and add essential components.

STEPS:
1. Create components.json config file:
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema.json",
  "style": "default",
  "rsc": true,
  "tsx": true,
  "tailwind": {
    "config": "tailwind.config.ts",
    "css": "app/globals.css",
    "baseColor": "slate",
    "cssVariables": true
  },
  "aliases": {
    "components": "@/components",
    "utils": "@/lib/utils"
  }
}
```

2. Create lib/utils.ts (overwrite existing with full shadcn utils):
```typescript
import { type ClassValue, clsx } from "clsx"
import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"

export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
}
```

3. Create components/ui/ folder and add these components:
- components/ui/button.tsx (variant: default, secondary, outline, ghost, destructive; size: default, sm, lg, icon)
- components/ui/card.tsx (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter)
- components/ui/badge.tsx (variant: default, secondary, outline, destructive)
- components/ui/input.tsx (with proper styling matching globals.css)
- components/ui/dialog.tsx (Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogClose)
- components/ui/sheet.tsx (Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetClose — for mobile nav)
- components/ui/separator.tsx (for section dividers)
- components/ui/avatar.tsx (Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback — for author cards, study room participants)

Use the shadcn/ui default component code style. Write all files using the `write` tool.

4. Update app/globals.css to add shadcn CSS variables at the top (if not already present — check first, don't duplicate).

5. Make sure package.json has all necessary deps: add "clsx" "tailwind-merge" if not present.

After writing all files, run: cd /root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub && yarn add clsx tailwind-merge

Then reply with a summary of what you created.
Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.

content.text:
## ✅ shadcn/ui Setup Complete — maiy-tech-hub

**Files created:**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `components.json` | shadcn/ui config (style: default, rsc, tsx, slate base) |
| `components/ui/button.tsx` | Button — variants: default, secondary, outline, ghost, destructive; sizes: default, sm, lg, icon |
| `components/ui/card.tsx` | Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter |
| `components/ui/badge.tsx` | Badge — variants: default, secondary, outline, destructive |
| `components/ui/input.tsx` | Input with focus ring + placeholder styling |
| `components/ui/dialog.tsx` | Full Radix Dialog — Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogClose |
| `components/ui/sheet.tsx` | Side drawer (mobile nav) — Sheet, SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle, SheetDescription, SheetFooter, SheetClose |
| `components/ui/separator.tsx` | Section divider — horizontal & vertical |
| `components/ui/avatar.tsx` | Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback |

**Already present (no changes needed):**
- `lib/utils.ts` — correct shadcn `cn()` util
- `app/globals.css` — already has full shadcn CSS variables (light + dark)
- `package.json` — already has `clsx`, `tailwind-merge`, `class-variance-authority`

**Installed (new):**
- `@radix-ui/react-dialog@1.1.15`
- `@radix-ui/react-separator@1.1.8`
- `@radix-ui/react-avatar@1.1.11`
- All transitive Radix dependencies

All components use `"use client"` where needed (Dialog, Sheet, Avatar, Separator), RSC-compatible otherwise, and are fully typed with shadcn defaults.
